message:
feat(runtime): add Prometheus-compatible metrics registry (bd-xox.3)

Lock-free metrics registry with fixed-slot storage and Prometheus text
exposition format output:

- 14 counters: render frames, ANSI parsed/malformed, effects, SLO
  breaches, resize events, cache hits/misses, VOI, BOCPD, e-process
- 3 gauges: terminal active, e-process wealth, degradation level
- 6 histograms: frame/diff/layout/widget duration, conformal interval,
  animation duration (fixed log-scale buckets 50-16000us)

All storage is AtomicU64/AtomicI64 for zero-allocation hot path.
14 unit tests, clippy clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
